title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Chiffon, Big Mom Pirates, Katakuri, Nami, Unknown person #14 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: capital, sweet city

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Where's Bege?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We'll catch up to them eventu- ally!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The seducing woods are Ablaze!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA might be fighting them over there.

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Reporting from the mirror world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Brother Mont D'Or!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: These 1000 soldiers are ready and waiting

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to be deployed anywhere at a moment's notice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Chocolate! Cheese! Nuts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Got it! I'll get back to you soon.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Tell all battleships on each island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: To closely watch the South- Western coast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't let the straw hats set off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your siege net will be our first line of defense!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After you lot, flavor island and liqueur island,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get your tart ships ready! Await orders at the harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Await the signal from the territory sea slugs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The sunny, on the South- Western Coast

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The forest sure is getting hectic.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA will be chasing them herself, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their chance of reaching here is of course already 0.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I would assume so.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then why would you lie in wait here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just in case.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: They're using their tart tanks, eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're almost to the coast! They'll never catch up with us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WAHAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: brother Bege!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wooaaah! You scared the crap out of me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Miss Pud-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, pudding! You may be a little girl, but I won't show you any mercy!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: I need to speak with Chiffon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Please, bring her out here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: HOGYAAAH! FUGYAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Pudding! Why are you here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is Mama having another of her eating fits?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I take it you need my chiffon cake, then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Remember I'll come

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: But I'm sorry, pudding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I, just like Lola before me, am going to get out of here while I still can.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care what happens to Mama or this country any more.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Yep! Got it, pudding? Get lost!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: No, that's not it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What I'm really after... isn't something for mama or for this country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't stop Mama as soon as we can...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He and his friends

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ONE PIECE®

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Are going to be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Her eyes tell the truth

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
